---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for Open Atlas
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem to solve

Describe the workflow, frustration, or missing capability.

## Proposed idea

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Why it matters

Explain the user value. Examples: better mapping workflow, easier editing, stronger exports, improved accessibility, better mobile behavior.

## Constraints

Call out anything that should stay true, especially:

- static hosting friendliness
- no required backend
- export compatibility
- low bundle and dependency weight

## Additional context

Mockups, references, example files, or related issues are welcome.
